toolsUsed: uv run python (temporary Agentfield probe agents)

assertionResults.reason: process_exec payloads received through Agentfield included integer ppid values, and ls child pid=256676 carried ppid=256649 matching the parent shell PID.
Agentfield node introspection for veronicad listed reasoner id notify.
Direct notify invocation returned ok=true and target VM shell output contained '[veronica] hello from vm-e2e'.
Could not validate the required LLM reasoning stage in full eBPF->LLM->notify pipeline because LM Studio was unreachable on localhost:1234.
For ls event pid=256676/ppid=256649, the agent called notify with target_pid=256649 (ppid), and message appeared on shell PID 256649.
After a forced notify failure (pid 99999999, ok=false), the agent processed the next process_exec event and successfully notified target ppid.
Python receive_event payloads captured through Agentfield included data.ppid as numeric values on process_exec events.
Cannot measure event->LLM->notify latency without an available LM Studio runtime; localhost:1234 was unreachable.

frictions.description: `uv run veronica list` failed with AttributeError ('list' object has no attribute 'items') due existing behaviors.json schema mismatch.
frictions.resolution: Used temporary Agentfield probe agents instead of CLI behavior orchestration to validate runtime assertions.

frictions.description: Agentfield Python SDK cross-agent calls from the temporary threaded setup emitted 'Event loop is closed' warnings and performed sync fallback, causing duplicated notify writes.
frictions.resolution: Validated outcomes using both captured agent state and daemon journal lines; unsubscribed temporary nodes after tests.

blockers.description: LM Studio API unavailable at http://localhost:1234, preventing validation of LLM-dependent full pipeline and latency assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried direct curl probe to /v1/models; connection failed each attempt.

summary: Tested 8 assigned VM/control-plane assertions: 6 pass, 0 fail, 2 blocked (LLM runtime unavailable).
